hero.subtitle: Meetropolis isn't another meeting tool. It's the place where your team is together all day — with spatial audio, spontaneous hallway chats, and a world that reflects your culture.
hero.urgency: Set up today — your team is in tomorrow.

trustBar.item1Text: Hetzner data center, Frankfurt am Main.
trustBar.item2Text: No US data agreement, no grey areas.

problem.title: Remote work often feels lonely.
problem.subtitle: Endless video calls. No spontaneous exchange. Team culture eroding with every new hire — until onboarding takes longer and good people quietly leave.
problem.card1Text: Your team sits isolated in front of screens. No hallway chat, no quick shout-out — just silence between meetings.
problem.card2Text: A video call for every little thing. The grid layout is exhausting, spontaneous alignment is impossible.
problem.card3Text: Chat here, video there, presence nowhere. Your team juggles too many tools — and loses track.

solution.title: Meetropolis puts an end to that.
solution.text: A virtual place where your team comes together — naturally. Walk through your office as an avatar, bump into colleagues in the hallway, and start a conversation on the spot. Like a real office, only better.

features.title: Everything your team needs. In one place.
features.subtitle: From spatial audio to custom avatars — Meetropolis brings everything together in one platform.
features.feature1Text: Hear and see only those nearby — just like in a real office. Proximity-based communication makes conversations natural and meetings unnecessary.
features.feature2Text: Build your own virtual office: meeting rooms, lounges, gardens. With the Tiled Editor, create worlds that reflect your company culture.
features.feature3Text: Share your screen right inside the virtual room — no extra tool, no meeting link. Colleagues just walk over and watch along.
features.feature4Text: Individual 2D avatars for every team member. Plus: a native desktop app with floating mini mode — your office is always just a click away.

howItWorks.title: Your virtual office in 3 steps.
howItWorks.subtitle: From signup to first coffee break — usually in under 10 minutes.
howItWorks.step1Text: Enter your email, pick a team name — you're in. No credit card needed.
howItWorks.step2Text: Pick a ready-made template or design your own office in the editor.
howItWorks.step3Text: Share an invite link or send emails. Each teammate creates their avatar and is ready to go.

comparison.title: You already have tools for calls and chat. Meetropolis is what's missing in between.
comparison.subtitle: Three tool categories for modern teams — and where Meetropolis fits in.
comparison.card2Gap1: No visual presence in the team
comparison.card3Subtitle: A virtual place for daily collaboration
comparison.card3Strength2: Spontaneous encounters like in an office

secondaryFeatures.title: And so much more.
secondaryFeatures.subtitle: Enterprise features your IT team will love.
secondaryFeatures.card1Text: Owner, Admin, Member, Guest — granular access control for every team.
secondaryFeatures.card2Text: Temporary invite links for applicants, freelancers, and external partners.
secondaryFeatures.card3Text: Fully bilingual. Every team member uses their preferred language.
secondaryFeatures.card4Text: Stripe integration with subscription management, invoice history, and self-service.
secondaryFeatures.card5Text: System health, active sessions, and user management at a glance.
secondaryFeatures.card6Text: Every team gets its own, fully isolated workspace.

pricing.title: More affordable than the alternatives. No compromises.
pricing.subtitle: Enterprise features at a fair price. Transparent and predictable.

social.title: Early teams, honest voices.
social.subtitle: Meetropolis is new — and we're upfront about it. What we don't have: ten thousand customers. What we do have: pilot teams using it daily, and a setup that delivers what it promises.
social.quotesSubtitle: Anonymised at the request of our Founders customers. Real quotes, no PR fluff.
social.quote1Text: We shrank our daily standup to 10 minutes because most things had already been clarified at the virtual desk. That was the moment I understood what spatial audio actually changes.
social.quote2Text: Day one of onboarding: new person gets an avatar and just walks through the rooms. Three days later, they know half the team by name. Before, that took three weeks.
social.quote3Text: What surprised us: we don't start the day with Slack anymore — we walk through the virtual office. The vibe is instant, and you can't generate that in Slack, no matter how many emojis.
social.pillarsSubtitle: Three promises we deliver to our first teams.
social.pillar1Text: No support bot. You talk to the founders. Feature requests hit the backlog same day.
social.pillar2Text: Early adopters keep their entry price. Even if we raise prices later, your plan is locked in.
social.pillar3Text: Servers in Germany, exportable anytime, self-hosting later. A real alternative, not a lock-in.

faq.title: Got questions? We've got answers.
faq.subtitle: The most common questions from real teams.
faq.q1Answer: All data is stored on servers in Germany (Hetzner). That keeps you GDPR-compliant — no data-processing agreement with US providers required.
faq.q2Answer: Create an account, pick a world, invite your team — usually under 10 minutes. Use ready-made templates or design your own office with the editor.
faq.q3Answer: If you do nothing, the trial expires and the account becomes read-only — no charge. Payment only starts when you actively pick a plan.
faq.q4Answer: Yes. Monthly plans cancel at the end of the month, annual plans at the end of the year. No minimum term, no lock-in.
faq.q5Question: What happens to our custom maps if we cancel?
faq.q5Answer: You can export all maps as files anytime — even during the read-only period after cancellation. Your worlds belong to you.
faq.q6Question: Do we need the desktop app?
faq.q6Answer: No. Meetropolis runs fully in the browser. The desktop app is optional and adds a floating mini mode for background use.

openSource.title: Soon available as Open Source & Self-Hosted.
openSource.text: Full data sovereignty, GDPR-compliant, on your own servers. Meetropolis will soon be available as a self-hosted open-source edition.

cta.title: Ready to open your virtual office?
cta.subtitle: Start your free 14-day trial. No credit card, no risk, no auto-renewal.
cta.honest: Honest: if your team is under 5 people and sees each other live every day, you probably don't need us.

footer.tagline:
The virtual office for remote teams.
Collaborate spontaneously, from anywhere.

consent.title: We use Meta Pixel
consent.description: We use Meta Pixel to improve our offering and show you relevant ads. Your consent is voluntary and you can revoke it any time via the “Cookie Settings” link in the footer.

legal.privacySubtitle: Privacy policy in accordance with GDPR

billing.cancelText: The payment was cancelled. You can try again at any time.

verify.successText: Your email has been successfully confirmed. You will be redirected shortly...

auth.brandingSubline: In just a few minutes, your team is connected — with spontaneous conversations, spatial audio, and a world that reflects your culture.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to enter your virtual office.
auth.registerTermsHint: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.inviteSubtitle: Enter your invitation code to join the team. You can find the code in the email or message you received.
auth.inviteCodeHint: The code is 12 characters long and starts with MEET-
